tests.name: connection_id_extension_codepoint_absent
tests.details: The supported extension table has no connection_id(54) entry and no connection_id handlers.

tests.name: tls12_cid_content_type_absent
tests.details: No public or internal TLS content-type constant/path for tls12_cid(25) was found.

tests.name: dtls12_parser_has_no_cid_field
tests.details: DTLS 1.2 records are parsed as type, version, epoch+sequence, length, body only.

tests.name: dtls13_cid_bit_rejected
tests.details: The only CID-bit handling is a DTLS 1.3 rejection path.

tests.name: dtls_writer_never_sends_cid
tests.details: DTLS 1.3 writer sets C=0; DTLS 1.2 writer emits the caller record type directly.

tests.name: cid_aad_algorithm_absent
tests.details: AEAD additional data uses the parsed record header, not the RFC 9146 CID AAD construction.

tests.name: dtls_inner_plaintext_only_dtls13
tests.details: Inner content type and zero padding exist only on the DTLS 1.3 encrypted-record path.

tests.name: plaintext_limit_present_but_not_cid_specific
tests.details: BoringSSL enforces generic plaintext limits but has no RFC 9146 CID-specific plaintext length field.
